title: Alex's Caves X Dolt Mod How Compat Datapack
description: Swaps out the generic Chests/Ladders in AC Structures for their Woodworks Pewen/Thornwood Versions via Dolt Mod How
body:
This is a Simple Datapack that Swaps out the Chests/Barrels and Ladders from the Cavemen Houses/Forlorn Huts From [Alex's Caves](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-caves) to use the [Woodworks](https://modrinth.com/mod/woodworks) Chests/Ladders added by [Dolt Mod How](https://modrinth.com/mod/dolt-mod-how)

**This Datapack changes NBT files, meaning it will not be compatible with any other Datapack/Mod that changes these Structures.**
